findings.title: Missing trailing newline
findings.description: The config file ends without a trailing newline. POSIX convention requires text files to end with a newline character. Some tools may warn about this.
findings.suggestedFix: Add a blank line at the end of the file to ensure it ends with a newline.

AC2.evidence: grep '^model:' found 0 matches in agent files; grep '#model:' found 0 matches. Note: toolsmith.md contains 'model:' in example template content (lines 227+), NOT in frontmatter

AC3.evidence: grep '#model:' found 0 matches in both agent/ and command/ directories

AC4.evidence: opencode-github-copilot.jsonc contains 22 agent configurations covering all 20 agent files plus model assignments

AC5.evidence: Line 126 added: 'Model configuration is separate — models are assigned in opencode*.jsonc config files, not in agent definitions'

AC6.evidence: model_profiles section exists in toolsmith.md body (lines 227+, within template examples)
